notes: PROJECT_STATE.md is treated as the authoritative PTP state for this memory.
predixai_context.json contains useful machine-readable context, but its governance PTP fields appear older than PROJECT_STATE.md.

repository_link.knowledge_role: Public PredixAI Knowledge Hub and GitHub Pages site, also used as the foundation, prompts, academy, research, docs, and agents repository.
repository_link.relationship: predixai-platform owns product/runtime code and official project state; predixai-knowledge exists as the public Knowledge Hub / GitHub Pages site and read-only adjacent knowledge repository for foundation, prompts, academy, research, docs, tools, and agents material.

architect.name: Leo / Arquiteto
architect.responsibility: Approval, scope, PTP, validation, publication, commit, and push.

chatgpt.role: Strategic organizer, PTP planner, checklist owner, conceptual validator, and risk decision support.

codex.role: Controlled code executor in the repository.

openclaw.role: Future local executor for commands, logs, doctor, audit, safe automation, and allowlist-based execution.

operational_spine.purpose: Human-readable official project state, current phase, approved PTP, pending PTP, environment, and audit rule.
Machine-readable project context, scope guardrails, modules, foundations, milestones, and execution constraints.
Small operational memory spine for PTP-083, designed for handoff and continuity without changing public docs or Trader behavior.

ptp_083_minimal_change.change: Create a single operational memory JSON under data/project_memory.
ptp_083_minimal_change.reason: Provide a stable, machine-readable handoff spine that creates the first memory link between the product, the public Knowledge Hub, and execution agents, without adding runtime behavior or changing Trader behavior.
